header.objective: Define compliance requirements for solutions-architect architectural analysis work
header.evaluator_input: spec_json + execution_log + query → boolean state per field

trigger_conditions.description: Scope and lens discipline must be maintained

criteria.name: scope_boundary_respected
criteria.condition: Analysis stayed within dispatched slice boundary; did not expand to adjacent seams or modules; did not analyze out-of-scope material (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 49, 18-19, 337)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show analysis stayed within dispatched slice boundary?

criteria.name: lens_discipline_maintained
criteria.condition: Dispatched lens was explicitly applied; observations from different lenses flagged as adjacent not absorbed; lenses not mixed into single reasoning (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 52-62, 200)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show dispatched lens was applied without conflation?

criteria.name: write_boundary_respected
criteria.condition: Only files within declared write boundary were touched; agent requested boundary expansion rather than silently continuing when needed (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 125)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent only touched files within declared write boundary?

required_actions.description: Analysis must apply depth-over-breadth, operational realism, and tradeoff transparency

criteria.name: depth_over_breadth_enforced
criteria.condition: Candidate architectures favored concentration of capability in deeper modules; options that spread shallow change across many components were flagged as structural drag (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 64-65, 202-203)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent favored depth over breadth and flagged shallow spread as drag?

criteria.name: operational_realism_applied
criteria.condition: Each architecture stress-tested: failure modes addressed, observability gaps addressed, rollback paths addressed, operator burden addressed; non-viable options explicitly flagged (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 78, 212)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show each option was operational stress-tested?

criteria.name: tradeoff_transparency_stated
criteria.condition: Each option states explicit strengths, weaknesses, risks, best-fit context; no option presented as universally superior (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 206, 325)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show each option included complete tradeoff transparency?

prohibited_actions.description: Analysis must not violate role boundaries, confidence standards, or schema conformance

criteria.name: no_cosmetic_options
criteria.condition: Agent did not pad option set with cosmetic variants; when fewer than N genuinely distinct options exist, returned fewer with explicit explanation (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 75, 215)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent avoided cosmetic option padding?

criteria.name: no_final_decision_or_inference_inflation
criteria.condition: Agent provided analysis not final decision; recommendation clearly analysis-supported not a vote; low confidence marked when evidence weak; inference not promoted to fact (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 325, 360-361)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent distinguished analysis from decision and evidence from inference?

criteria.name: schema_and_role_conformance
criteria.condition: Output structure matched schema declared in dispatch brief; all required sections present (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 314-315, 317-328)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show output conformed to stated schema and role boundaries?

evaluator_summary.pass_threshold: all checks must return true for spec compliance
